prompt:
Chuyển 2 X posts này thành Facebook content:

Post 1 - @nickcdev: "Built a code review visualization tool using Claude Code. It maps PR dependencies, shows review bottlenecks, and generates weekly team reports. Saved our team 5 hours/week on code review coordination. github.com/nickcdev/code-review-graph"

Post 2 - @AISafetyWatch: "Anthropic just released the Claude Max plan at $200/month — unlimited usage for power users. Some developers reporting $500+ in API savings. But is it worth it for non-developers?"

Tạo Facebook posts cho cả 2.
assertions: Output contains NO URLs in any Facebook post body
Output contains NO emoji or special Unicode characters
Output produces posts for BOTH X posts (not just one)
Each post has a different angle/lens — no repeated perspectives
Output does NOT mention code architecture, PR dependencies, or technical implementation
Output translates technical concepts into user benefits
All posts are between 300-600 words each
CTA directs to comments for links where relevant
